strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Vitest across multiple enterprise roles, matching the core stack and testing requirements.
Direct experience with AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators), aligning with the job's emphasis on emerging technologies and AI agent development.

Proven ability to optimize high-traffic systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests/sec) and scale solutions (e.g., Direct Mail automation platform sending millions of mails annually).
concerns: Recent employment history shows frequent job changes (e.g., multiple roles since 2021), which may raise questions about long-term commitment despite strong technical fit.
Primary stack expertise is heavily weighted toward TypeScript/Node.js, with limited evidence of recent Kotlin/Java usage, despite the job description requiring proficiency in these languages.
No explicit mention of cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) or Kubernetes experience in recent roles, despite the job description listing them as required.

key_factors.factor: Full-stack TypeScript/Node.js expertise with React and Vitest
AI agent infrastructure and emerging technology experience

response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates exceptional alignment with the core technical requirements of the Senior Fullstack Developer role, particularly in TypeScript/Node.js full-stack development, React, and Vitest. His recent work in AI agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators) and high-traffic system optimization (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec) directly addresses the job's emphasis on emerging technologies and scalability. His open-source contributions and enterprise experience further validate his architectural and problem-solving capabilities, making him a strong candidate despite minor concerns about job stability and secondary stack relevance.
